title: CosmicUtilities
description: CosmicUtilities is a utilities mod that improves gameplay. Specifically made for CosmicPrisons, brought to you by the Minecoin team.
body:
# 🛠️ What is CosmicUtilities?
CosmicUtilities is a mod that was developed by the Minecoin team to bring back many useful aspects of Cosmic Client. Take advantage of useful QoLs like Peaceful Mining, Cooldown hud, Satchel HUD, and much more to come!

## ✅ Features
### Peaceful Mining
Tired of people getting in your way whilst mining? Well now when you hold out your pickaxe, players will become translucent so you can mine freely!

![Peaceful Mining Demo](https://imgur.com/Kj0gN3j.png)

### Cooldown HUD

View all of your cooldowns in one place- This HUD gives you a screen overlay so you know when your cooldowns are up!

**Supported Cooldowns:** Adrenaline, Feed, Fix, Home, Jet, Powerball

![Cooldown HUD Demo](https://imgur.com/vSrMb85.png)

### Satchel HUD
Easily view on-screen all of your satchels and how full they are so you know just when to sell!

![Satchel HUD Demo](https://imgur.com/Fe3wIeb.png)

### Easy-view Number Overlay
Easily glance and see the amount of a certain item you have without hovering over it!

**Supported Items:** Cosmic Energy, Money, Gang Points, Charge Orbs, Black Scrolls

![Number Overlay Demo](https://imgur.com/4Z9QAsW.png)

### Mod Customization Menu
Customize and toggle different aspects of the mod.

![Mod Customization Menu](https://imgur.com/8JIc3WP.png)

### Other Features
- Chat Mention & Message Notifications
- Pickaxe Drop Confirmation
- Right click while mining for Powerball

## ❓ How to add the mod to Lunar Client:
- Open Lunar Client's version selector and click on the version you wish to use
- Press the ⚙️ button at the bottom right, then select the Mods tab at the top
- Drag the mod into the window
